evals.prompt: Who are my top 5 customers by total spend?
evals.expected_output: Generates SQL from the active OSI model + few-shot examples, executes it locally, returns the top-5 result rows plus a receipt panel showing the SQL, relationships used, confidence scores, and model version pin. Does NOT invoke an external service; never sends the rows off-machine.

Resolves 'revenue' against any approved metric definition in the OSI model (Rule 1 metric) before generating SQL. If revenue is defined as a metric, uses that definition; if not, generates a candidate SQL and surfaces the metric definition for review. Returns 12 monthly rows ordered by month with the receipt panel.
